reviews.comment:
15 minutos esperando que se dignen a atender los empleados amotinados en la oficina y cola de 10 autos

(Translated by Google)
15 minutes waiting for the rioting employees in the office to deign to attend to us, and a queue of 10 cars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5aHNpVDlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No se los otros ACA, pero los de Neuquen y Cipolletti, no te cobran los lubricantes con la app YPF, y el trato es un poco engreido por los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
I don't know about the other ACA stations, but the ones in Neuquén and Cipolletti don't charge you for lubricants with the YPF app, and the service is a bit arrogant from the attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5dUs2RVlnEAE

reviews.comment:
Súper excelente la atención sea en la playa o en el shop full.
Pernocte en la playa muy segura y la verdad da gusto compartir un momento de la vida en un lugar con gente tan hospitalaria. Muchas gracias.

(Translated by Google)
The service was absolutely excellent, both on the beach and in the full-service shop. I spent the night on the beach; it felt very safe, and it was truly a pleasure to share a moment of life in a place with such hospitable people. Thank you so much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5aWQzcThnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El complejo ACA tiene allí además de la estación de servicio completa al Motel que se encuentra enfrente y que tiene un restaurante de primera. Como en todo el País, ACA e YPF, una dupla imbatible.

(Translated by Google)
In addition to the full service station, the ACA complex also houses the motel across the street, which also has a first-class restaurant. As throughout the country, ACA and YPF are an unbeatable duo.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkanBtQ0x3EAE
